args.query: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_count, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_count FROM index_trade WHERE Date >= '2018-01-01' AND Date <= '2018-12-31' AND "Index" IN ('GSPTSE','IXIC','NYA') GROUP BY "Index";

exec_args.sql: SELECT "Index", SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" > "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS up_count, SUM(CASE WHEN "Close" < "Open" THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS down_count FROM index_trade WHERE Date >= '2018-01-01' AND Date <= '2018-12-31' AND "Index" IN ('GSPTSE','IXIC','NYA') GROUP BY "Index";

result.preview:
"Indices in North America that had more up days than down days in 2018:

- GSPTSE (S&P/TSX Composite): 44 up days vs 41 down days
- IXIC (NASDAQ Composite): 44 up days vs 31 down days"
